## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Validation

- [ ] Frontend build passes
- [ ] Python tests pass
- [ ] Manual flow tested (`/consent`, `/blocked`, `/authorized`, `/showcase`) if applicable
- [ ] Deployment/env var changes documented

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Auth/guardrail changes reviewed
- [ ] Consent/settlement path behavior verified if touched

## Deployment Notes

List required env var updates, migration steps, and rollback plan (if any).

## Related Issues

Link issues, audit items, or docs references.
